title: 5.6oz Christmas Fake Snow Decoration, Fluffy Artificial Faux Snow for Crafts, Indoor Fiber Snow for Christmas Village, Xmas Tree Decoration, White Winter Wonderland Snowy Scene, Xmas Nativity
features: Package Include: You will receive 1 pack of 5.6 ounces of fake snow. Fluffy white artificial snow looks like real snow, can be torn apart into any shape or covers a space of 20 sq ft to create winter-theme scenes. Enough snow to meet your various winter holiday Christmas decor needs for Christmas mantle village, Christmas tree, winter party, or DIY craft.
Material: The faux snow made of lightweight fiber material. You can decorate the house with your kids to create a white Christmas scene and enjoy more holiday fun!

Christmas Decorations: The artificial snow for crafts is for indoor uses only. Snow is perfect for Christmas trees, Christmas mantle village snow blanket or small train stations, nativity set, arts and DIY crafts projects, table settings, holiday cards, windows and doors, floor, wall, ceiling shelves, bookcases and photo background. Christmas fake snow can help create your own winter wonderland, enhancing the Christmas festive atmosphere! Great for living rooms, bedrooms, offices, store displays.
Easy to Use: The fake snow for crafts is vacuum packed. Once the package is open, use your hands to gently fluff and separate so the fake snow decoration can become fluffy again.

Easy to Clean: For hard surface, use a sof brush to gently remove as much loose faux snow for crafts as possible. For surfaces like glass or plastic, use a dry cloth to wipe away remaining particles. For fabric surfaces, gently shake the fabric to remove as much of the fake snow as possible, and then use a vacuum cleaner to remove the remaining fluffy fake snow.
description: Product Description Ultra-realistic polyester fiber snow creates a three-dimensional, lifelike snow cover or soft, fluffy snow-ground effect in any indoor setting. Package Include: 1 pack of 5.6 ounces of fake snow. Safe Material: polyester fiber. Non-toxic and odorless. Wide Uses: Perfect for creating a snowy base under Christmas trees, decorating tabletops, fireplace mantels, and windowsills with a winter touch. Ideal for Snow Village displays, gift wrapping, filling gift baskets, photography props, and DIY craftings. Also great for retail stores and cafés as seasonal window displays, shelf styling, or small decorative vignettes. Why choose us? Polyester fiber snow looks more natural and doesn’t crumble, creating a fuller and more realistic snowy scene. It can be pulled apart into a thin layer or shaped into fluffy snow mounds. When stretched out, it covers a large area while remaining light to the touch. Highly moldable—easy to pull, spread, and shape, and can be secured with glue or spray adhesive. Its volume and loft give it a more three-dimensional look, perfect for recreating realistic snow blankets or soft, fluffy snow-ground effects.
